productName: Cormorant - 4 oz 1:1 Mango Sorbet 100 mg - 100 mg - 100ml
description: A mouth-watering bright, juicy mango infused treat with candy-kitchen charm and a smooth cannabis experience tucked into every serving. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. A flavorful indica option for customers who want their cannabis wrapped in something genuinely craveable.
